title: Cosmos Scribble Cat — a charcoal-scribble cat that draws itself, with googly eyes that follow your cursor, on painted grass
title_vi: Cosmos Scribble Cat — mèo vẽ nguệch ngoạc tự vẽ, mắt nhìn theo con trỏ, trên nền cỏ vẽ tay
summary: A loose charcoal-scribble cat draws itself stroke by stroke (tangled random-walk strokes + fuzzy stray-hair edge), with big white scribble eyes whose pupils track the pointer, sitting on a procedurally painted grass field. Tap to re-scribble. Self-contained Canvas 2D, offline, reduced-motion aware.
usage_notes: RUN: open index.html (no deps). TECHNIQUES: body = a few continuous random-walk scribbles bounded to an ellipse; fuzzy edge = short radiating hair strokes; eyes = white scribble discs with live pupils; bg = layered gradients + brush dabs + yellow doodles + soft shadow; self-draw = incremental segment reveal. INTERACTION: move = eyes follow; tap/click = re-draw. CUSTOMISE: swap the character in buildCat(); tune size/draw-speed/pupil-follow/colors via the CFG block.
summary_vi: Một chú mèo vẽ bằng nét than nguệch ngoạc tự vẽ chính mình từng nét, mắt to nhìn theo con trỏ/ngón tay, ngồi trên nền cỏ vẽ procedural. Chạm để vẽ lại. Canvas 2D tự chứa, offline.
notes: Reference-recreation (Ra) from Alex's IMG_3847 (Goro Fujita scribble style). Lives in repo cosmos-akashic-effects/web-templates/fx/scribble-cat/.
